title: Thawing and Seeding Frozen Cells
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"e3jdv","text":"How to thaw cells from the liquid nitrogen storage and seed into a tissue culture flask","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"e970u","text":"Gloves must be worn at all times.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c9a1c","text":"Perform all tasks within biosafety cabinet.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"61j4e","text":"Anything entering biosafety cabinet must be generously sprayed with 70% ethanol (even you).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bvlo8","text":"When finished, wipe biosafety cabinet with 70% ethanol, and UV for at least 15 minutes.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"afdhp","text":"Warm cell culture media, DPBS, and Trypsin-EDTA in   water bath.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":51,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"4o11r","text":"Wash waste beaker with soap and warm water, then dry with paper towel.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aimh4","text":"Expose serological pipet tips, centrifuge tube, and waste beaker to UV for at least  .","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":84,"length":1}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"temperature","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"C05C6CF086EB11E98C37CBB60D6963AB","id":0,"label":"","protocol_name":"Mammalian Cell Culture: Refreshing Media","temperature":"37","unit":10}},"1":{"type":"duration","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"duration":900,"guid":"C4BF78F086EB11E98C37CBB60D6963AB","id":0,"label":"","protocol_name":"Mammalian Cell Culture: Refreshing Media"}}}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"a6jun","text":"(1) T-75 or T-25 flask per frozen cell vial (or more if plating at a lower density)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4gus5","text":"(1) 15 mL centrifuge tube per frozen cell vial","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f3lfo","text":"(1) 10 mL serological pipet tip per T-75 flask or (1) 5 mL serological pipet tip per T-25 flask","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"83vi4","text":"Warmed cell culture media","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"59jlr","text":"1000 μL filter pipette tips","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Thaw cells by suspending cryotube in 37 °C water bath until completely thawed, but no longer than necessary
Within biosafety cabinet, transfer cell suspension to 15 mL centrifuge tube using 1000 μL pipette.
Add 1 mL warmed cell culture medium to cell suspension dropwise . Adding the inital cell culture medium slowly helps prevent cell death caused by a rapid change in osmotic pressure.
Add an additional 3 mL warmed cell culture medium to cell suspension slowly.
Centrifuge the cell suspension at for 00:03:00 .

Remove bulk of supernatant with serological pipet, then remove remainder with 1000 μL pipette. For small cell pellets, you are better off leaving a small amount of media than disturbing the cell pellet.
Add 1 mL warmed cell culture media to cell pellet. Allowing the cell pellet rest in media for about 2 minutes will help with resuspension.
Gently pipette mix the cell pellet into the solution.
Add an additional 7 mL warmed cell culture media [ 3 mL for T-25].
Using a serological pipet, transfer the cell suspension to the tissue culture flask.
Label the flask with: Cell line Passage number Date Your intials
Don't forget to remove the vial you used from the frozen storage inventory.
creator: Kenneth Schackart
